omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may share your personal data with: ... (c) third parties for marketing purposes, where we have your consent to do so in accordance with applicable law (for example, if you opt-in to receiving marketing communications from third parties). These third parties may include (i) our commercial partners, being any third party with whom we have a commercial relationship, such as our content licensors (e.g. sports rights holders), distribution partners, and promotional partners; and (ii) our media partners, being any third party that is a media agency, advertising network, or other media services partner;
